title: Decision Process for a DFA Recognizing Strings Ending with '01'
description: A flowchart demonstrating the application of a Deterministic Finite Automaton (DFA) to determine if a given input string ends with the substring '01'.
relationships: Transitions between states based on input symbols: q0 on '0' -> q1; q0 on '1' -> q0; q1 on '0' -> q1; q1 on '1' -> q2; q2 on '0' -> q1; q2 on '1' -> q0
